entity.summary: Romania-operated centralized crypto and derivatives exchange officially launched in 2023 through Lionheart Limited S.R.L.
entity.notes: BitDelta's official anniversary history places its official launch in 2023, while its official terms identify Romania-incorporated Lionheart Limited S.R.L as the platform operator. The exact launch day is not stated, so HEI uses a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: BitDelta officially launched
events.description: BitDelta officially launched its multi-asset crypto and derivatives trading platform in 2023.
events.notes: The official anniversary history establishes the launch year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: BitDelta official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitDelta identity and active trading platform.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitDelta
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitDelta identity.

evidence.title: BitDelta General Terms and Conditions
evidence.notes: Official terms identify Lionheart Limited S.R.L as the company operating the exchange platform and state that it is incorporated under Romanian law.

evidence.title: BitDelta Turns 1: A Trip Down the Memory Lane of Our Biggest Achievements
evidence.notes: Official anniversary article states that BitDelta officially launched in 2023.
